name: Cisco ASA syslog
sampleLines: Jun 27 01:47:21 fw02 %ASA-4-106023: Deny tcp src outside:1.2.3.4/443 dst inside:10.0.0.5/52001 by access-group "OUTSIDE-IN"
<162>Apr 28 04:02:03 asa-edge: %ASA-2-106017: Deny IP due to Land Attack from 10.0.0.1 to 10.0.0.1
description: Adapted from logstash-plugins/logstash-patterns-core patterns/ecs-v1/firewalls (Apache-2.0), entry CISCO_TAGGED_SYSLOG + CISCOFW*. Grok macros (SYSLOG5424PRI, CISCOTIMESTAMP, %{HOSTNAME}, %{GREEDYDATA:event.original}) inlined to plain PCRE2 here so we do not depend on Oniguruma %{...} resolution.
